//: Scope 2 in-process workload spec. Each step names a SQL query the WorkloadPlaybackValidator times against the per-run ephemeral database (median of `iterations` runs). The runner compares the measured latencies against the previous run's measurements (run-based baseline) — no baseline.json. First run records a baseline and Passes; a later run that regresses beyond latencyRegressionThreshold surfaces a Warning.

steps.query: SELECT MessageId, ChannelId, UserId, PostedAt FROM dbo.Messages ORDER BY PostedAt DESC;
